thread.title: UP byelection results: ‘Muslims ensured BJP’s victory in Kundarki bypoll’ | Lucknow News - Times of India
thread.title_full: UP byelection results: ‘Muslims ensured BJP’s victory in Kundarki bypoll’ | Lucknow News - Times of India

author: Rajiv Srivastava
title: UP byelection results: ‘Muslims ensured BJP’s victory in Kundarki bypoll’ | Lucknow News - Times of India
text: BJP secured seven UP bypoll seats on Saturday, but the victory that stood out was in the Muslim-dominated constituency of Kundarki in Moradabad. The win caught many off guard, including the Samajwadi Party and political analysts. Elated by the outcome, JPS Rathore, UP cooperative minister and party’s in-charge of Kundarki seat, spoke to Rajiv Srivastava about the party’s strategic electioneering that led to the remarkable result. Excerpts:Many congratulations on the win. How would you describe the Kundarki victory?Thank you very much. I am speechless at the way people have supported the BJP; it’s beyond my imagination. I think the anger against the Samajwadi Party and its candidate, along with the benefits of the schemes being run by central and state govts reaching the people translated into votes this time.SP has demanded repolling, claiming that the administration did not allow many people to vote.They had made similar complaints about the Sishamau seat but they won there. Second, how many voters can the police stop from voting — 5,000 or 10,000? The margin of victory in Kundarki is 1.44 lakh votes. People have voted in favour of the BJP candidate without any pressure. The type of struggle Ramvir Singh has gone through, even when he was not contesting elections, is known to everyone. He was always ready to help the people of Kundarki.Many find it hard to believe that Muslims voted for the BJP in Kundarki.Muslims have supported the BJP because they were left with no other option. BJP has also accepted them with open arms. The Samajwadi Party had been getting Muslim votes but failed to do anything constructive for the community, especially in areas like education and employment. Now, gradually, they have started realising that the schemes run by the central and state govts are unbiased and helping them improve their standard of living.Are you saying Muslims have openly voted for the BJP?Certainly, yes. It’s the only reason the BJP won the bypolls by such a huge margin. This margin wouldn’t have been possible without Muslim support. We went to Muslim villages and asked them why they were against us when the BJP govts have been impartial in ensuring benefits reach them.What was BJP’s strategy in Kundarki?SP had been misleading the voters with the PDA narrative, while the fact is that the actual work done for the PDA was by the BJP govts. The poor welfare schemes run by the BJP have benefited people from the PDA the most. Now they have understood that the Opposition parties have been deceiving them. Above all, I even used the Kundarki Vidhan Sabha as an experiment. Luckily, all the strategies we applied have been fruitful and we will try to apply them further.Do you see the possibility of Muslims supporting the BJP further?Before Kundarki, no one believed this could happen, but it did. We will make every effort to garner their support. If they take one step, we are ready to take several steps toward them. Even the Chief Minister said that this is a victory for nationalist voters.
